articles.source_summary: NBC News is a major American news organization that provides coverage of national and international news, including politics, business, health, technology, and culture. It serves a broad audience through television broadcasts, digital platforms, and mobile applications. The organization is owned by NBCUniversal, a subsidiary of Comcast, and operates as part of a large media network. Founded in 1940, NBC News has become one of the leading news providers in the United States, known for its reporting and multimedia journalism. It is generally considered mainstream and plays a central role in American media.

articles.title: ADC Supreme Court ruling: Start editing your handover note – Eze to Tinubu
articles.summary:
Following the Supreme Court ruling that restored the David Mark led National Working Committee of the African Democratic Congress, ADC, on Thursday, a Chieftain of the party, Chief Eze Chukwuemeka Eze, has said that it is over for the President Bola Tinubu administration. Eze, in a statement on Friday, criticized the Attorney General of the […]

articles.title: In a drought? Here's how to grow food with less water
articles.summary: In drought-prone regions, watering your vegetable garden is typically allowed even when watering lawns is restricted. But just because you can use water doesn't mean you shouldn't try to conserve it. Here's how you can use a lot less water and still enjoy home-grown produce this year.

articles.title: David Mark: There’s deliberate plot to diminish Supreme Court ruling in certain quarters – ADC
articles.summary:
The African Democratic Congress, ADC, has said there is a deliberate plot to diminish the importance of the Supreme Court judgment which acknowledged the David Mark and Rauf Aregbesola-led leadership of the party. Bolaji Abdullahi, the spokesman of the ADC, said people in some quarters are describing the judgment as “pyrrhic victory” while wondering why […]

articles.title: BREAKING: Louisiana Suspends Primaries After Major Supreme Court Ruling
articles.summary: Louisiana has suspended its May primary elections for congressional races following the Supreme Court ruling on Wednesday on its congressional map, as districts need to be redrawn in order to be legally compliant. The Supreme Court ruled that one of the state’s majority-minority districts was illegally racially gerrymandered. “Yesterday’s historic Supreme Court victory for Louisiana ...
articles.source_summary: The Daily Wire is an American digital media company and news platform that covers politics, culture, and current affairs. It publishes news articles, opinion pieces, and multimedia content, often from a conservative editorial perspective, serving readers interested in political commentary and analysis in the United States. The platform also produces podcasts, videos, and entertainment content. The Daily Wire operates as a privately owned media organization within the digital news and opinion sector. Founded in 2015 by Ben Shapiro and Jeremy Boreing, it emerged during the growth of online political media platforms. Over time, it has expanded its content offerings and audience reach, developing a subscription-based model. Its platform reflects its role in providing commentary-driven journalism and engaging audiences through digital media.

articles.title: Ukraine rose seven positions in the world press freedom ranking for 2026
articles.source_summary: Babel is a Ukrainian digital news outlet that provides coverage of national and international news, with a focus on politics, society, culture, and investigative reporting. The platform targets a broad audience, including international readers through its English-language content. It operates as a privately owned independent media organization. Founded in 2018, Babel emerged as part of a new generation of Ukrainian digital journalism, emphasizing in-depth reporting and modern storytelling formats. The outlet has gained recognition for its investigative work, interviews, and feature articles. It is generally considered mainstream with an independent editorial approach, contributing to media diversity in Ukraine. The website offers news updates, long-form content, and multimedia features, serving both domestic and global audiences interested in developments in Ukraine and the wider region.

articles.title: ADT data breach exposes customer information
articles.summary: ADT confirms a new data breach exposing customer names, phone numbers and addresses. The cybercrime group ShinyHunters claims it stole millions of records.
articles.source_summary: Fox News is a major American cable news network and digital media platform that provides coverage of national and international news, politics, business, and entertainment. Launched in 1996 and owned by Fox Corporation, it is one of the most widely watched news networks in the United States. Fox News is known for its extensive political coverage, including live broadcasts, analysis, and opinion programming. Its website complements television content with breaking news articles, opinion pieces, and multimedia features. The network has a distinct editorial identity often associated with conservative viewpoints, while also delivering general news reporting. Fox News plays a significant role in the U.S. media landscape, influencing public discourse and reaching a broad audience through both broadcast and digital channels.

articles.source_summary: The Independent is a British online news outlet that covers national and international news, including politics, business, culture, lifestyle, and global affairs. It serves a broad English-speaking audience with a focus on digital journalism and multimedia content. The publication operates as a privately owned media organization under Independent Digital News & Media. Founded in 1986 as a print newspaper, The Independent was established to provide an alternative voice in the UK media landscape. It transitioned to a fully digital format in 2016, becoming one of the first major UK newspapers to cease print publication. The outlet is often described as having a center-left editorial perspective. Its reporting includes breaking news, analysis, opinion pieces, and feature stories. Through its global digital presence, The Independent reaches readers worldwide and contributes to public discourse on a wide range of political, social, and cultural issues.

articles.source_summary: ARY News is a Pakistani television news channel and digital platform providing coverage of national and international news, politics, business, and current affairs. It serves a broad Urdu-speaking audience and is considered a mainstream media outlet in Pakistan. The channel operates as part of the ARY Digital Network, a private media group. Launched in 2004, ARY News has developed into a widely viewed broadcaster, offering live news coverage, talk shows, and digital content focused on political and social developments.

articles.source_summary: Trend News is an Azerbaijan-based news agency providing coverage of regional and international news, politics, economy, and energy developments, particularly in the Caucasus and Caspian regions. It serves an international audience through multilingual content, including English, Russian, and Azerbaijani. The agency operates as a state-owned media organization under the Azerbaijani government. Founded in 1995, Trend has developed as a key source of news and information on regional affairs, offering reporting, analysis, and data on economic and geopolitical developments.

articles.title: UK warns of ‘highly likely’ attack after terror threat level increase
articles.summary:
The UK's terrorism threat level was raised Thursday to "severe", the second highest in the five-tier system, following an antisemitic terror attack the previous day in London, the interior ministry said.
The post UK warns of ‘highly likely’ attack after terror threat level increase appeared first on Vanguard News.

articles.title: The IEA’s Fatih Birol on ‘the greatest energy security threat in history’
articles.summary:
The war in Iran continues with no clear end in sight, fueling economic turbulence and concerns of a global energy crisis. International Energy Agency Executive Director Fatih Birol spoke at an AC Front Page event on April 13th, and argued the conflict is the greatest energy security threat in history. He warned that oil prices will soon “converge” with the on-the-ground reality, knocking the global economy further into disarray.
The post The IEA’s Fatih Birol on ‘the greatest energy security...
articles.source_summary: UkraineAlert is a digital publication of the Atlantic Council, providing analysis and commentary on Ukrainian politics, economy, and international relations. It publishes expert articles and opinion pieces aimed at policymakers, analysts, and readers interested in developments in Ukraine. As part of a U.S.-based think tank, it functions as a policy analysis platform rather than a traditional news outlet. Established during the 2010s, it contributes to international discussion on Ukraine and regional security. Its content includes commentary, analysis, and expert insights on geopolitical developments.

articles.title: Britain raises official terror threat level to severe
articles.source_summary: CTV News is a Canadian news organization providing comprehensive coverage of national and international news, politics, business, health, and entertainment. It serves a nationwide audience through television broadcasts and digital platforms, and is considered a mainstream media outlet in Canada. CTV News operates as part of Bell Media, a subsidiary of BCE Inc., one of Canada’s largest telecommunications companies. The network traces its origins to the launch of CTV in 1961, Canada’s first private television network. Over time, it has developed a wide network of local stations and digital services, delivering continuous news coverage and analysis to audiences across the country.

articles.source_summary: Liberty Times (Liberty Times Net) is a Taiwanese digital news platform providing coverage of national and international news, politics, economy, and society. It serves a broad Chinese-speaking audience and is considered a mainstream media outlet in Taiwan. The platform operates as part of the Liberty Times Group, a privately owned media company, and is generally associated with a pro-independence editorial stance. Founded in 1980 as a print newspaper and later expanded online, it has developed into one of Taiwan’s most widely read news sources, offering continuous updates and multimedia content.

articles.title: US Congress votes to end longest partial government shutdown
articles.source_summary: Sweden Herald is a digital news platform providing coverage of Swedish and international news, politics, economy, and society. It serves an English-speaking audience interested in developments in Sweden, including expatriates and international readers. The outlet operates as an independent online publication and publishes news articles, summaries, and reports. Established in the 2020s, Sweden Herald reflects the growth of English-language news services focused on Sweden, offering accessible reporting and curated content for global audiences seeking information about the country.

articles.source_summary: Zawya UAE is a business and financial news platform that provides coverage of economic developments, corporate activity, markets, and industry trends across the Middle East and North Africa, with a focus on the United Arab Emirates. It serves professionals, investors, and decision-makers seeking reliable business intelligence and regional insights. Zawya is owned by Refinitiv, which is part of the London Stock Exchange Group, making it part of a global financial data and analytics organization. Originally launched as a regional business information service, Zawya has expanded into a comprehensive digital news platform offering analysis, reports, and market data. It is considered a mainstream source for business news in the region and is widely used by corporate and financial audiences.

articles.summary: WASHINGTON (Sputnik) - US President Donald Trump on Friday dismissed concerns about depleting US weapons stocks due to the armed conflict with Iran.

articles.source_summary: Legit Nigeria is a Nigerian digital news platform that provides coverage of national and international news, politics, business, entertainment, and lifestyle topics. It is part of the Legit media network, which operates in multiple countries. The platform publishes articles, features, and multimedia content, often focusing on trending stories and human-interest topics. Legit Nigeria emphasizes accessibility and high-volume content production, targeting a broad audience through its website and social media channels. Its coverage includes breaking news, celebrity updates, and social issues relevant to Nigerian readers. The outlet plays a role in Nigeria’s digital media landscape by delivering widely consumed online content and engaging audiences across platforms.
